name: AgentDB Memory
description: Long-term, cross-device agent memory backed by AgentDB — Schema.org entities with semantic recall, offline-safe writes, and workspace sharing for multi-agent fleets.

baseUrl.description: AgentDB REST base URL (no trailing slash). Falls back to AGENTDB_BASE_URL.

pairingToken.description: Single-use pairing token for first boot. Falls back to AGENTDB_PAIRING_TOKEN.

apikey.description: Workspace api key — required for Shared-domain fleet memory.

domain.description: Data domain memories are written to.

stateDir.description: Directory for persisted credentials and the offline queue. Default ~/.openclaw/agentdb.
